title: ObjectLayer
description: A data-only layer of TileMapObjects — spawn points, trigger zones, collision regions, markers. Object layers are not rendered by the tile renderer; they are parsed and exposed for gameplay use (e.g. building physics colliders, placing entities). Query with query (untyped, fully back-compatible) or, when an ObjectSchema type argument `S` is supplied, with the typed accessors byType, byKind, and where — these narrow `properties` to the developer-declared shape. The schema is **opt-in**: the default type parameter reproduces the original untyped behaviour, so `new ObjectLayer(options)` and `map.getObjectLayer('x')` are unchanged.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: A data-only layer of TileMapObjects — spawn points, trigger zones, collision regions, markers. Object layers are not rendered by the tile renderer; they are parsed and exposed for gameplay use (e.g. building physics colliders, placing entities).

Query with query (untyped, fully back-compatible) or, when an ObjectSchema type argument `S` is supplied, with the typed accessors byType, byKind, and where — these narrow `properties` to the developer-declared shape. The schema is **opt-in**: the default type parameter reproduces the original untyped behaviour, so `new ObjectLayer(options)` and `map.getObjectLayer('x')` are unchanged.

members.name: byKind
members.signature: byKind(kind: K): Extract<RectangleObject<TileProperties>, object> | Extract<EllipseObject<TileProperties>, object> | Extract<PointObject<TileProperties>, object> | Extract<PolygonObject<TileProperties>, object> | Extract<PolylineObject<TileProperties>, object> | Extract<TileObject<TileProperties>, object> | Extract<TextObject<TileProperties>, object>[]
members.returnType: Extract<RectangleObject<TileProperties>, object> | Extract<EllipseObject<TileProperties>, object> | Extract<PointObject<TileProperties>, object> | Extract<PolygonObject<TileProperties>, object> | Extract<PolylineObject<TileProperties>, object> | Extract<TileObject<TileProperties>, object> | Extract<TextObject<TileProperties>, object>[]
members.description: Objects of the given geometry ObjectKind, narrowed to that geometry's member type (e.g. byKind(ObjectKind.Polygon) yields PolygonObjects with their points). Returns a fresh array.

members.name: byType
members.description: Objects whose type equals type, with properties narrowed to the schema shape S[T]. Returns a fresh array (insertion order). The narrowing is a static convenience only — no runtime validation is performed (see ObjectSchema). On an unschematised layer this behaves like query({ type }) with TileProperties properties.

members.name: getObjectById
members.description: First object with the given id, or undefined.

members.name: getObjectByName
members.description: First object with the given name, or undefined.

members.name: query
members.description: Objects matching every specified criterion of filter. Returns a fresh array.

members.name: where
members.signature: where(type: T, predicate: object): TypedObject<S, T>[]
members.description: Objects of type (typed as in byType) that also satisfy predicate. A convenience combination of byType and Array.filter that keeps the narrowed properties type inside the predicate. Returns a fresh array.

members.name: drawOrder
members.description: Draw order for the objects (Tiled draworder). Informational.

members.name: kind
members.description: Layer-kind discriminant (distinguishes object layers from tile layers).

members.name: objects
members.description: The objects in this layer (insertion order).
